ddls:
CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the interaction type */,
  "interaction_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type (e.g., HBOND, Ionic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction type */,
  "strength_range" TEXT /* Typical strength range of the interaction type */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of occurrence of the interaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., scientist, analyst) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specific area of research the researcher specializes in */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the researcher's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who uploaded the data */,
  "pdb_id" TEXT /* PDB ID of the uploaded protein */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the data was uploaded */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the uploaded file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the uploaded file */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the uploaded data */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* Researcher who last updated the upload */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher accessing the data */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the interaction being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser and device) used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher managing the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, on hold) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the project data */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* Researcher who last updated the project */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the property entry */,
  "pdb_id" TEXT /* PDB ID of the protein */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., molecular weight, isoelectric point) */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the property value */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the property data (e.g., experimental, predicted) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the property data */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* Researcher who last updated the property */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analysis entry */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the interaction being analyzed */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis (e.g., stability prediction) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis (e.g., computational, experimental) */,
  "tool_used" TEXT /* Tool or software used for the analysis */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the analysis data */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* Researcher who last updated the analysis */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)
